violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025

Grapes were observed with an accumulation of mold build-up. Grapes were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Establishment is to monitor the quality of produce frequently. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025

Deli meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Reviewed proper date marking with staff. Deli meat was properly date marked at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025

The cutting boards in the meat prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

The floor in the basement area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025
Part of the ceiling in the basement area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
Grapes and peaches were observed with an accumulation of mold build-up. Food was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment is not to use slicer until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. 3-bay sink was set up at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Deli meat and cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

ROP fish was observed thawing with ROP packaging still intact.Fish was observed at 33 DF and was completely removed from packaging at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Food products such as rice and drinks were observed being stored outside. Per PIC, food was delivered earlier today. Food must be stored inside of the establishment in a way that prevents any contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

The cutting boards in the meat prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

The freezer condenser fan was observed in poor repair with a piece of unit missing, exposing wire. The meat display cooler #1 door was observed in poor repair with water stuck between glass. Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
Tray was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024
Dishes and cutting boards were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

Cheese, deli meats and cut watermelon were observed held at 45-53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

Cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

At the time of inspection, ROP fish was thawing with package intact. Reduced oxygen packaging fish that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment. Temperature was observed to be 31 degrees. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024
Several foods were observed stored on the floor throughout the establishment. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024
At the time of inspection, ambient of dairy case was at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC called for service. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving (chips) have an accumulation of rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
Observed missing ceiling tiles throughout basement. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and black/brown residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024
